title: Drone Delivery Swarm: Safety-Bubble Packing in Restricted Airspace
strategies: airspace-aware equal-radius grid: touching bubbles on a coarse lattice clipped to the circular airspace, skipping cells that hit a no-fly zone (reproduces the checker baseline B, ~0.1)
grow-in-place: start from the grid then enlarge each bubble to the maximum radius allowed by the airspace boundary, no-fly zones and fixed neighbours (boundary bubbles first)
best-first insertion: over a fine candidate lattice clipped to the airspace, repeatedly drop the single bubble with the largest achievable feasible radius into the biggest remaining gap
constructive layered packing + local perturb-and-regrow refinements that trade bubble count against bubble size around the no-fly keep-out circles
